releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Release/1.0.7 by @eharris128 in https://github.com/eharris128/obsidian-bluesky/pull/12
* 
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7414a02a-ba32-4fdd-9f23-1614758d5d08)
- Warn users about invalid a handle / password when posting via tab or command palette
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/120ce436-f602-4592-bff4-39bad409d334)
- No longer delete data when an error arises during the posting of an individual post or a thread 


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/eharris128/obsidian-bluesky/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7
